items.raw_excerpt: Archaeologists have uncovered the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever found in the Netherlands, during excavations in the Waalfront district of Nijmegen. The dig, carried out by the archaeology firms RAAP and BAAC on a former industrial site, also turned up housing blocks, streets, luxury townhouses, a tower and tens of thousands of objects, Nijmegen council said. The baths stood in Ulpia Noviomagus, the Roman city on the site of present-day Nijmegen. The site is at least 4,900 square metres –.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists found the largest Roman bathhouse complex ever discovered in the Netherlands. The site in Nijmegen also included streets, homes, a tower, and tens of thousands of objects.
items.summary_ko: 고고학자들이 네덜란드에서 지금까지 발견된 것 중 가장 큰 로마 시대 목욕탕 유적을 찾았습니다. 네이메헌의 이 유적에서는 거리, 주거지, 탑, 수만 점의 유물도 함께 나왔습니다.
items.title_en: Roman Bathhouse Found in Nijmegen
items.title_ko: 네이메헌에서 로마 목욕탕 유적 발견
items.title_original: Archaeologists uncover the Netherlands’ largest Roman bathhouse

items.raw_excerpt: En el corazón de l’Horta Nord, donde el verde de los campos de cebollas y chufas marca el ritmo del reloj, se levanta un lugar que hoy es orgullo nacional. No es una gran metrópolis, ni falta que le hace. Se trata de Foios, el municipio valenciano que ha regalado al fútbol mundial una de ... Leer más
items.summary_en: Foios is a small town in Valencia, set among onion and tiger nut fields in l'Horta Nord. The town is known for its neighborhood life and as the birthplace of footballer Ferran Torres.
items.summary_ko: 포이오스는 발렌시아 오르타 노르드에 있는 작은 마을로, 양파밭과 추파밭 사이에 자리하고 있습니다. 이 마을은 정겨운 동네 생활과 축구 선수 페란 토레스의 고향으로 알려져 있습니다.
items.title_en: Foios, the Valencia Town Where Ferran Torres Was Born

items.title_original: El pueblo de Valencia donde nació Ferran Torres: orgullo de huerta, vida de barrio y cuna del 'Tiburón - Noticias del Vino

items.raw_excerpt: TRE GIORNI DI SPORT, GIOCHI, ATTIVITÀ E SORPRESE IN PIAZZA MAGGIORE E PIAZZA NETTUNO
items.summary_en: Strabologna 2026 will open its city festival village in Bologna on Friday. For three days, Piazza Maggiore and Piazza Nettuno will host sports, games, activities, and surprises.

items.raw_excerpt: The vessels—which are thought to be the graves of high-status individuals—could potentially date back to the Viking Age.
items.summary_en: Archaeologists in Sweden found rare Viking Age burial ships. The vessels are believed to be graves of high-status individuals from the Viking era. The discovery is being called a sensational find.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴 고고학자들이 바이킹 시대의 희귀한 매장선을 발굴했습니다. 이 배들은 당시 지배층의 무덤으로 추정됩니다. 고고학계는 이번 발견을 '경이로운 성과'라고 평가하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Viking Burial Ships Found in Sweden

items.raw_excerpt: Dubai’s dynamic media and advertising ecosystem has allowed content creator and videographer Habeeb to adapt quickly to international standards and evolving digital platforms
items.summary_en: Content creator and videographer Habeeb moved from a small town in Kerala to Dubai's creative industry. Dubai's media and advertising scene helped him learn international standards and adapt to new digital platforms.
items.summary_ko: 콘텐츠 창작자이자 영상 제작자인 하비브는 케랄라의 작은 마을에서 두바이 창작 산업으로 진출했다. 두바이의 미디어와 광고 환경은 그가 국제 기준을 익히고 새로운 디지털 플랫폼에 빠르게 적응하는 데 도움이 됐다.

items.raw_excerpt: Discover 7 classic general stores that still serve fishing villages, lake towns, and mountain communities across the state of Mainehttps://www.worldatlas.com/maps/united-states/maine.
items.summary_en: WorldAtlas highlights seven classic general stores across Maine. These shops still serve fishing villages, lake towns, and mountain communities with a local, old-time feel.

items.raw_excerpt: After 11 years of being closed, the Royal Museum of Fine Arts in Antwerp has reopened with an ingenious extension that means Old Masters and modern art now share the limelight
items.summary_en: The Royal Museum of Fine Arts in Antwerp has reopened after 11 years. A new extension lets Old Masters and modern art share the main attention.
items.summary_ko: 앤트워프 왕립미술관이 11년의 폐관을 끝내고 다시 문을 열었다. 새로 만든 확장 공간 덕분에 옛 거장들의 작품과 현대미술이 함께 주목받게 됐다.

items.raw_excerpt: Piscine panoramiche, scivoli incastonati nel verde, aree benessere e attività outdoor: riparte la stagione estiva al Villaggio della Salute Più.
items.summary_en: The summer season has started again at Villaggio della Salute Più. The park has scenic pools, slides set in greenery, wellness areas, and outdoor activities.

items.raw_excerpt: From Gaspé to North Hatley, these small Quebec towns pair rivers, mountains, art, and heritage with easygoing travel stops for every season.
items.summary_en: WorldAtlas highlights nine small towns in Quebec, from Gaspé to North Hatley. The towns offer rivers, mountains, art, heritage, and relaxed stops in every season.

items.raw_excerpt: Helsingin ja Vantaan rajalle aukeaa tänään perjantaina uusi ostoskylä Helsinki Outlet.
items.summary_en: A new outlet village called Helsinki Outlet opens today on the border of Helsinki and Vantaa. It has dozens of shops, and the article says everything there is always on sale.

items.raw_excerpt: A new lease has been announced for the abandoned Double Island resort and Brad Pitt, Keanu Reaves and Jenifer Aniston have been invited back for the reopening party. Work on providing public access is expected to start this year.
items.summary_en: The Queensland government signed a new lease for the abandoned Double Island resort off Far North Queensland. Brad Pitt, Keanu Reeves, and Jennifer Aniston have been invited to the reopening celebration. Public access work is expected to start this year.
items.summary_ko: 퀸즐랜드 정부가 북부 퀸즐랜드 해안의 버려진 더블 아일랜드 리조트에 새 임대 계약을 체결했습니다. 브래드 피트, 키아누 리브스, 제니퍼 애니스턴이 재오픈 파티에 초청되었습니다. 대중이 섬을 이용할 수 있도록 하는 공사가 올해 시작될 예정입니다.
items.title_en: Abandoned island resort gets new lease, stars invited for party

items.raw_excerpt: France braced for another heat wave on Wednesday, with Paris allowing swimming in one of its canals so residents could cope with the heat.
items.summary_en: France prepared for another heat wave on Wednesday. Paris allowed swimming in one of its canals so residents could cool down.

items.raw_excerpt: Le musée apocalyptique en plein air, La Demeure du chaos se prépare à changer de visage pour accueillir la troisième édition de la Battle du chaos le dimanche 16 juin.
items.summary_en: La Demeure du Chaos, an open-air apocalyptic museum near Lyon, is getting ready for a new look. It will host the third Battle du Chaos music event on Sunday, June 16.

items.raw_excerpt: A court has suppressed the images of two women accused of graffitiing two RSLs in Melbourne for 12 months after their case is finalised.
items.summary_en: A court has banned media from showing the faces of two women accused of graffiti at two RSL clubs in Melbourne. The ban will last for 12 months after their case is finished.
items.summary_ko: 법원이 멜버른의 RSL 클럽 두 곳에 낙서를 한 혐의를 받는 여성 두 명의 얼굴을 언론이 공개하지 못하게 했다. 이 금지는 재판이 끝난 뒤 12개월 동안 유지된다.

items.raw_excerpt: Il Caseificio Pieve Roffeno, a 880 metri di altitudine, raccoglie i suoi foraggi in pascoli di montagna tra i più alti della zona votata alla produzione del re dei formaggi italiani
items.summary_en: A dairy in Pieve Roffeno makes mountain Parmigiano at 880 meters above sea level. It gathers forage from high mountain pastures in an area known for the famous Italian cheese.
items.summary_ko: Pieve Roffeno의 한 치즈 공장은 해발 880미터에서 산지 Parmigiano를 만든다. 이곳은 이탈리아의 대표 치즈 생산지로 알려진 지역이며, 공장은 높은 산악 목초지에서 사료 작물을 거둔다.
items.title_en: Mountain Parmigiano in the Bologna Apennines
items.title_ko: 볼로냐 아펜니노 산지의 산 Parmigiano
items.title_original: Cos’è il Parmigiano di montagna e come si produce sull’Appennino bolognese - CiboToday

items.raw_excerpt: Countless expeditions have left Tasmania to explore Antarctica, but this island state has an even deeper connection with the sea.
items.summary_en: Many expeditions left Tasmania to explore Antarctica. The island state also has a deep link with the sea, shown at this maritime museum in Hobart.
items.summary_ko: 많은 탐험대가 남극을 탐험하기 위해 태즈메이니아에서 출발했다. 호바트에 있는 이 해양 박물관은 바다와 깊게 이어진 태즈메이니아의 역사를 보여 준다.

items.raw_excerpt: El Año Sorolla refuerza la complicidad del Estado con Madrid, que en 2022 invirtió medio millón de euros en adquirir seis pinturas para el Museo Sorolla, que muestra 114 obras del valenciano y conserva 1.500 en sus almacenes
items.summary_en: Spain's culture ministry has not bought a Sorolla artwork for the Museum of Fine Arts of Valencia for almost 40 years. The report compares this with recent state support for Madrid's Sorolla Museum, which received six paintings in 2022.
items.summary_ko: 스페인 문화부는 거의 40년 동안 발렌시아 미술관을 위해 소로야 작품을 사지 않았다. 기사에서는 2022년 마드리드 소로야 미술관에 작품 여섯 점을 사 준 국가 지원과 비교하고 있다.
items.title_en: Spain Has Not Bought Sorolla Works for Valencia Museum in Decades
items.title_ko: 스페인, 발렌시아 미술관에 소로야 작품 40년 가까이 미구입
items.title_original: Cultura no compra obra de Sorolla al Museo de Bellas Artes de Valencia desde hace casi 40 años - elDiario.es

items.raw_excerpt: Located at Plaza Singapura, the lifestyle store sells lifestyle products such as keychains, bags, pouches, apparel and jewellery, and will operate till November this year.
items.summary_en: Singapore's first White Rabbit-themed pop-up store has opened at Plaza Singapura. The shop sells items like keychains, bags, pouches, clothes, and jewellery, and will run until November this year.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 첫 화이트 래빗 테마 팝업 매장이 플라자 싱가푸라에 문을 열었다. 이 매장은 키링, 가방, 파우치, 의류, 주얼리 등을 판매하며 올해 11월까지 운영된다.

items.summary_en: The medieval fair "Armi e mestieri" will take place at Fortezza Nuova in Livorno on Saturday 11 and Sunday 12 October. The event is scheduled from 10:00 to 18:00.
